literacyLesson.summary: Mhie, opinion lang yan na retired na si PewDiePie, pero partial true lang kasi lumipat lang siya Japan at parang semi-retired lang, gets?

points.issue: Teh, ang claim is retired na raw si PewDiePie, but that's more of an interpretation kesa sa hard fact.
points.correction: Dapat ang credible source dito, may direct statement galing kay PewDiePie mismo or sa official reps niya na nag-announce ng 'retirement'.

points.issue: Kahit may sources na nag-confirm na lumipat siya Japan, it doesn't automatically mean retired na siya, sis.
points.correction: Ang paglipat sa ibang bansa is different from retiring, so dapat separate facts yan, hindi assumption.

points.issue: Wikipedia and YouTube are good for background info, but not the best for 'retirement' announcements.
points.correction: Mas okay ang official press releases or news articles from reputable sources like news outlets or entertainment sites.

literacyLesson.tip: Next time, tignan natin kung ano mismo sinasabi ng subject bago tayo mag-jump into conclusions, okay?
